miniapp.name: Merge Sip
miniapp.subtitle: Flick, slide & merge drinks
miniapp.description: A beach-bar shuffleboard puzzle: flick tropical drinks up the sand, merge matching pairs into fancier cocktails, and chase the Legendary Tiki. Serve to-go orders for bonus coins — but don't let the bar back up past the line!
miniapp.tagline: Merge your way to the Tiki
miniapp.ogDescription: Flick and merge tropical drinks into the Legendary Tiki in this beach-bar shuffleboard game.
